DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcAppointmentReminderTemplate t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/

/*DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcAppointments t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.clientId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
*/

DECLARE @BatchSize INT = 50000;
DECLARE @DeletedRows INT = 1;

WHILE @DeletedRows > 0
BEGIN
    ;WITH ToDelete AS (
        SELECT TOP (@BatchSize) t.AppointmentId
        FROM dbo.hcAppointments t
        INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.clientId = cp.id
        INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
        INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    )
    DELETE t
    FROM dbo.hcAppointments t
    INNER JOIN ToDelete td ON t.AppointmentId = td.AppointmentId;

    SET @DeletedRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

    IF @DeletedRows < @BatchSize
        BREAK;
END

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcavailabilities t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.hcStaffMember hs
    JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = hs.tblmemberId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE t.entityid = hs.id AND t.entitytypeid = 1
      AND (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.ChildProfile cp
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE t.entityid = cp.id AND t.entitytypeid = 2
      AND (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )
);
